---
name: Board Support Request
about: Request support for a new ESP32 development board
title: '[Board] '
labels: board-request
---

## Board Information

- **Board name**: 
- **Manufacturer**: 
- **MCU**: (ESP32-S3 / S2 / C3 / C6)
- **Purchase link**: 

## Display

- **Size**: (e.g. 1.28")
- **Resolution**: (e.g. 240x240)
- **Type**: (LCD / AMOLED)
- **Shape**: (Round / Rectangular)
- **Driver IC**: (e.g. GC9A01, ST7789, CO5300)
- **Interface**: (SPI / QSPI)

## Touch

- **Has touch**: (Yes / No)
- **Touch IC**: (e.g. CST816S, FT6236, GT911)

## Additional Info

- **Flash**: MB
- **PSRAM**: MB (or None)
- **Other peripherals**: (button, IMU, mic, etc.)
- **Pin mappings known**: (Yes / No)
- **I have this board**: (Yes / No — can help test)
